chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter must designate in the permit application the counties in which the applicant intends to operate. A permit issued under this subchapter is not valid in a county that is not designated in the permit application.

(b) Of the fee collected under this subchapter for a permit:

(1) 75 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund;

(2) 15 percent of the amount collected shall be divided equally among and distributed to the counties designated in the permit application; and

(3) 10 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B. 2620 ), Sec. 14(2), eff. September 1, 2019.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.403 (County and Municipality Designation) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (68), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.423 — County Designation; Distribution of Fee

(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter must designate in the permit application the counties in which the applicant intends to operate. A permit issued under this subchapter is not valid in a county that is not designated in the permit application.

(b) Of the fee collected under this subchapter for a permit:

    (1) 75 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund;

    (2) 15 percent of the amount collected shall be divided equally among and distributed to the counties designated in the permit application; and

    (3) 10 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B. 2620 ), Sec. 14(2), eff. September 1, 2019.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.403 (County and Municipality Designation) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (68), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B.2620), Sec. 14(2), eff. September 1, 2019.*

75 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund;
15 percent of the amount collected shall be divided equally among and distributed to the counties designated in the permit application; and
10 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
